datasync.task.overrides.CfnAbout: Customizes the reporting level for aspects of your task report. For example, your report might generally only include errors, but you could specify that you want a list of successes and errors just for the files that DataSync attempted to delete in your destination location.

datasync.task.overrides.Deleted.Description: Specifies the level of reporting for the files, objects, and directories that DataSync attempted to delete in your destination location. This only applies if you [configure your task](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/datasync/latest/userguide/configure-metadata.html) to delete data in the destination that isn't in the source.

datasync.task.overrides.Skipped.Description: Specifies the level of reporting for the files, objects, and directories that DataSync attempted to skip during your transfer.

datasync.task.overrides.Transferred.Description: Specifies the level of reporting for the files, objects, and directories that DataSync attempted to transfer.

datasync.task.overrides.Verified.Description: Specifies the level of reporting for the files, objects, and directories that DataSync attempted to verify during your transfer.
